hero.title: Manage your delivery addresses
hero.subtitle: Keep your home, office, and pickup details organized so checkout stays fast and accurate.

auth.title: Sign in to manage addresses
auth.description: Your saved addresses are tied to your account. Sign in to view, add, or update delivery locations.

states.emptyDescription: Add a delivery address to speed up checkout and keep your orders routed correctly.
states.errorDescription: There was a problem loading your saved locations.

form.createDescription: Enter the delivery details exactly as you want them used for future orders.
form.editDescription: Update the saved details for this delivery location.
form.primaryHint: Mark this address as your preferred default at checkout.

messages.error: Something went wrong while saving the address.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this address?
deleteDialog.description: This action removes the address from your saved locations.
